description: Wiki names that are synonyms of existing eco.json openings. When a wiki entry's name matches a key here, it is treated as an alias of the corresponding existing opening rather than a new addition. The synonym check runs after parent-name prefixing, so the wiki name already has its root opening prepended (e.g., 'Ruy Lopez: Schliemann Defense, Jaenisch Gambit Accepted, Schliemann Defence Accepted').

synonyms.Schliemann Defence Accepted: Ruy Lopez: Schliemann Defense, Jaenisch Gambit Accepted
